author: y4rr
content: Result: GGUF conformance coverage now live. Fixture generated at ferrotorch-serialize/tests/conformance/fixtures/serialize_gguf.bin (386 bytes, GGUF v3, 2 metadata KVs + 3 tensors: weights.0 [4,4] F32, weights.1 [8] F32, weights.q8 [32] Q8_0). Replaced gguf_items_cascade_skip() with 12 live test functions covering parse_gguf_bytes, load_gguf, load_gguf_mmap, load_gguf_state_dict, load_gguf_state_dict_mmap, GgufFile, GgufMetadata, GgufTensorInfo, GgufValue, GgmlType, dequantize_gguf_tensor (F32 passthrough + Q8_0 dequant). All 53 conformance_serialize tests pass. cargo clippy -D warnings clean.
